event: White Nights city scene in St. Petersburg
description: A monochrome drawing or print showing a nighttime urban canal scene. Tall buildings with lit windows flank a narrow waterway. A stone bridge with a railing crosses the foreground. A solitary small figure stands on the bridge or embankment. The water reflects the dark buildings. The style uses heavy black lines and crosshatching to create deep shadows and atmospheric mood. Three chimneys or columns rise in the background against a pale sky.
